title: Tom, The Piper's Son
content:
Tom, Tom, the piper's son,
    Stole a pig and away did run;
    The pig was eat, and Tom was beat,
    And Tom went roaring down the street.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "Tom, The Piper's Son", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
